items.detail: 599 trigger zones (threshold: 90). Zones used in triggers are evaluated every frame.
CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.

6,675 non-blank lines of mission-specific Lua (frameworks excluded): AF_SETUP.lua (4,174), WelcomeMessage_Afghanistan_.lua (1,414), EWRS.lua (968), Zeus.lua (87), gm_bench.lua (32). Threshold: warning >5,000, critical >15,000.
